profile_line: [metalprof-hybrid P=22] total=6720.7  gemm+roundtrip=6051.6  rest(recurrence/attn/norm)=669.1 ms  path=q4k
resident_summary: resident: Q4_K=184 tensors/7942.50MiB  Q5/6_K=0/0.00MiB  Q8=313/11604.37MiB  f32=354/4860.09MiB  total=24406.96MiB  decode=19.08GiB/tok
notes: The logged rest bucket is an upper bound for GDN recurrence because it also includes full-attention, norms, q8 panel quantization, conv, gating, residuals, and cache bookkeeping.
The run waited for the GPU lease before loading; the profile line was emitted after the lease was acquired.
This is a decision witness for #65, not a throughput authority row.
verdict: CPU-hybrid remains the correct #65 decision: with resident-Q4_K projections on Metal, projection GEMM/round-trip is still about 90.0% of the measured pp22 hybrid prefill split, while the entire non-projection bucket is about 10.0% and the recurrence-only compute bound stays low-single-digit. Keep the GDN recurrence on CPU; build a Metal scan kernel only under the separate #92 trigger if a later resident-forward profile isolates recurrence as the wall.
